title: Due Scheduling, Monotonic Clocks, Backoff, Jitter, and Pause Policy · Language Lens: Feed Go Pause Resume
summary: A ticker polls every feed at one interval, wall-clock jumps duplicate work, failures retry in lockstep, successful publishers never adapt, and paused sources remain due. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go pause resume increment in deterministic adaptive polling scheduler. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, cha…
objectives: Make manual, policy, repeated-failure, deletion, and incident pauses explicit, authorized, observable, and safely resumable.
Adjust cadence from update history and publisher guidance without exceeding freshness or publisher budgets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Predict Feed Go Pause Resume · Theory Feed Go Pause Resume
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go team handles case 8884 during an accessible community-news reader review. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.
